---
title: "Method of compartment"
author: "MJY"
date: "2026-04-17"
output: html_document
---

################################################################################ 

# 

# OUTLINES:

# isualize A/B compartments using pyGenomeTracks

# 

################################################################################ 

# 

```{bash eval=FALSE}

# =========================
# Define genomic regions to plot
# =========================
region=( "chr3:0-160039680" "chrX:0-171031299")

# =========================
# Create output directory
# =========================
mkdir -p /public/home/mjy/HCC/compartment/pygenometracks/hicexplorer_iced

# =========================
# Loop through regions and generate plots
# =========================
for i in ${region[@]} ; do

# Run pyGenomeTracks to plot compartment signals
pyGenomeTracks --tracks /public/home/mjy/HCC/compartment/pygenometracks/log/hicexplorer_iced_config.ini \
               --region $i \
               -o /public/home/mjy/HCC/compartment/pygenometracks/hicexplorer_iced/hicexplorer_iced_${i}.png

# Print progress
echo "$i finish"
date

done


```

# Configuration file (INI)

```{bash eval=FALSE}

[x-axis]
where = top
#color = #0000FF
#color = #DE8BF9
#color = #0F99B2

# =========================
# Control 6w
# =========================
[test bedgraph]
file =/public/home/mjy/HCC/compartment/hicexplorer/04.final_bed_raw/con_6w_hicexplorer_final_A.bedgraph
height = 1
color=#EF8521
title = con_6w
min_value=0
max_value=0.05

[test bedgraph]
file=/public/home/mjy/HCC/compartment/hicexplorer/04.final_bed_raw/con_6w_hicexplorer_final_B.bedgraph
height=1
color=#3F7DB8
min_value=-0.05
max_value=0

# =========================
# Control 10w
# =========================
[test bedgraph]
file =/public/home/mjy/HCC/compartment/hicexplorer/04.final_bed_raw/con_10w_hicexplorer_final_A.bedgraph
height = 1
color=#EF8521
title = con_10w
min_value=0
max_value=0.05

[test bedgraph]
file=/public/home/mjy/HCC/compartment/hicexplorer/04.final_bed_raw/con_10w_hicexplorer_final_B.bedgraph
height=1
color=#3F7DB8
min_value=-0.05
max_value=0

# =========================
# Control 18w
# =========================
[test bedgraph]
file =/public/home/mjy/HCC/compartment/hicexplorer/04.final_bed_raw/con_18w_hicexplorer_final_A.bedgraph
height = 1
color=#EF8521
title = con_18w
min_value=0
max_value=0.05

[test bedgraph]
file=/public/home/mjy/HCC/compartment/hicexplorer/04.final_bed_raw/con_18w_hicexplorer_final_B.bedgraph
height=1
color=#3F7DB8
min_value=-0.05
max_value=0

# =========================
# CCl4 6w
# =========================
[test bedgraph]
file =/public/home/mjy/HCC/compartment/hicexplorer/04.final_bed_raw/ccl4_6w_hicexplorer_final_A.bedgraph
height = 1
color=#EF8521
title = ccl4_6w
min_value=0
max_value=0.05

[test bedgraph]
file=/public/home/mjy/HCC/compartment/hicexplorer/04.final_bed_raw/ccl4_6w_hicexplorer_final_B.bedgraph
height=1
color=#3F7DB8
min_value=-0.05
max_value=0

# =========================
# CCl4 10w
# =========================
[test bedgraph]
file =/public/home/mjy/HCC/compartment/hicexplorer/04.final_bed_raw/ccl4_10w_hicexplorer_final_A.bedgraph
height = 1
color=#EF8521
title = ccl4_10w
min_value=0
max_value=0.05

[test bedgraph]
file=/public/home/mjy/HCC/compartment/hicexplorer/04.final_bed_raw/ccl4_10w_hicexplorer_final_B.bedgraph
height=1
color=#3F7DB8
min_value=-0.05
max_value=0

# =========================
# CCl4 18w
# =========================
[test bedgraph]
file =/public/home/mjy/HCC/compartment/hicexplorer/04.final_bed_raw/ccl4_18w_hicexplorer_final_A.bedgraph
height = 1
color=#EF8521
title = ccl4_18w
min_value=0
max_value=0.05

[test bedgraph]
file=/public/home/mjy/HCC/compartment/hicexplorer/04.final_bed_raw/ccl4_18w_hicexplorer_final_B.bedgraph
height=1
color=#3F7DB8
min_value=-0.05
max_value=0


```
